title: Trump’s Latest Oil Blockade Brings Bigger Economic Risks
summary_full: Oil markets shrugged it off, but the effort to hurt Iran could provoke retaliation that inflicts more damage on energy assets and the global economy.
summary_public: Oil markets shrugged it off, but the effort to hurt Iran could provoke retaliation that inflicts more damage on energy assets and the global economy.

IR.label: mixed
IR.evidence: effort to hurt Iran could provoke retaliation that inflicts more damage
